estimation_method.TR: linear fit of MRA/Greedy TR ratio over completed 5k-100k points, anchored to actual 200k Greedy TR
estimation_method.CR: linear fit of MRA/Greedy CR ratio over completed 5k-100k points, anchored to actual 200k Greedy CR
estimation_method.BPT: log-linear fit of MRA BPT over completed 5k-100k points
estimation_method.accepted_assignments: linear fit of MRA/Greedy accepted-assignment ratio anchored to actual 200k Greedy accepted assignments

estimation_method.TR: linear fit of RamCOM/BaseGTA TR ratio over completed 5k-100k points, anchored to actual 200k BaseGTA TR
estimation_method.CR: linear fit of RamCOM/BaseGTA CR ratio over completed 5k-100k points, anchored to actual 200k BaseGTA CR
estimation_method.BPT: log-linear fit of RamCOM BPT over completed 5k-100k points
estimation_method.accepted_assignments: linear fit of RamCOM/BaseGTA accepted-assignment ratio anchored to actual 200k BaseGTA accepted assignments
estimation_method.cross_assignment_count: log-linear fit of RamCOM cross count over completed 5k-100k points
